split_method: repository-disjoint; base frames use sha256(seed:repository) first uint32 modulo 3 (0 => dev, otherwise eval); v3 reclassifies the 16 inspected diversity cases to dev and assigns the 16 unseen replacements to eval using the explicit frozen ID lists
annotation_unit: (workflow, job, step-or-job scope, task, reachable state)

supersedes.reason: The v2 targeted diversity snapshots influenced pre-label detector corrections and were moved to development before any human labeling or evaluation.

control_path_correction.exclusion_reason: The source path was not an exact-case direct child of .github/workflows and therefore was not an active GitHub Actions workflow path.
